case_title: PROFESSIONAL COLLECTION CONSULTANTS VS. ISAAC GOMEZ et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: COPIES USED IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROFESSIONAL COLLECTION CONSULTANTS
